SEARCH
Package parsers

Class DocumentParser

java.lang.Object
parsers.Base_Parser
parsers.DocumentParser
public class DocumentParser extends Base_Parser
This class parses files using a MeasureParser, KeySigParser, and MetaDataParser. When it finds a new key signature, it parses it and gives it to the MeasureParser to work with. Otherwise, it parses out measures and gives the resulting strings to the MeasureParser for parsing into measures. It takes these measures and creates a new Document object with them.

  • Method Details

    • getDocumentFromFile

      public Document getDocumentFromFile() throws FileNotFoundException
      Throws:
      FileNotFoundException

    • getListOfMeasuresFromInFile

      private List<Measure> getListOfMeasuresFromInFile() throws FileNotFoundException
      Parses and returns a list of Measure objects from the input file.

      Scans the file line-by-line, updating the measureParser's key signature when a key signature line is detected, and collecting measure data to parse into Measure instances.

      Returns:
      a list of parsed Measure objects representing the document's measures
      Throws:
      FileNotFoundException - if the input file cannot be found

    • parseMeasureFromScanner

      private Measure parseMeasureFromScanner(Scanner scanner)
      Parses a single Measure from the current position of the scanner.

      Reads lines until the closing </measure> tag is found, accumulating the measure's content for parsing.

      Parameters:
      scanner - the scanner reading from the input source
      Returns:
      a parsed Measure object representing the scanned measure chunk

    • getMetadataFromInFile

      private HashMap<String,String> getMetadataFromInFile() throws FileNotFoundException
      Extracts metadata from the input file's MEI header section.

      Reads lines until the closing </meiHead> tag is reached, then passes the accumulated metadata string to the metaDataParser.

      Returns:
      a HashMap of metadata key-value pairs parsed from the file
      Throws:
      FileNotFoundException - if the input file cannot be found

    • setInFile

      public void setInFile(File inFile)
      Setting the inFile to a file to read from.
      Parameters:
      inFile - The file we are setting this classes internal file to
